---
title: "Capacitación"
---

## Presentaciones

### Quarto

{{< revealjs "https://hackods.github.io/ecosistemaHackODS/#/title-slide" height="300px" width="70%" >}}


{{< revealjs "https://hackods.github.io/intro-jupyter-pandas/#/title-slide" height="300px" width="70%" >}}


{{< revealjs "https://hackods.github.io/intro-plotly/#/title-slide" height="300px" width="70%" >}}

### Storytelling

{{< revealjs "https://luiggix.github.io/01_bigbang/#/title-slide" height="300px" width="70%" >}}

{{< revealjs "https://luiggix.github.io/02_storytelling_data/#/title-slide" height="300px" width="70%" >}}


### Material

{{< pdf "pdfs/INEGI_HackODS_UNAM_2026.pdf" height="400px" width="70%" >}}
